case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL VS YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC R O

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,489.51 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS AS TO DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC R O ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC R O

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC R O PLTFF. CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 24447, RECORD TRANSFERRED
